ctxMarket: Attention is on Solana’s recent price movement, with exchange outflows of over $300M in 24 hours supporting bullish sentiment. The surge in meme coin trading and notable venture activity are also in focus.
ctxTalking:
• Solana’s price holding above $90 and the potential for further gains if momentum continues
• A Trump-themed meme coin on Solana spiking in price and volume as holders seek access to an exclusive event
• Significant venture capital raises and acquisitions involving Solana ecosystem projects
ctxMatters: Sustained outflows from exchanges can signal strong holder conviction for Solana. The meme coin trend highlights how community-driven tokens can create new engagement models. Venture activity and acquisitions may influence the pace of new product launches and integrations on Solana.
ctxSignal:
Signal: Large exchange outflows and major venture deals point to continued institutional and retail interest in Solana.
Noise: Short-term meme coin price spikes tied to exclusive events may not reflect broader market trends.
ctxGlossary:
Exchange outflows — Crypto assets moving from trading platforms to private wallets, often seen as a sign of holding.
Meme coin — A cryptocurrency inspired by internet memes or pop culture, usually with speculative appeal.

readMore.title: Solana flips $90 support – SOL’s rally to $100 possible ONLY IF…
Trump Meme Coin Price, Trading Volume Skyrocket as Holders Vie for Exclusive Event Access
